components.description: Original stratified random sample from the trigram-discoverable space (m2_sample.sql). Measures recall WITHIN the space blocking already searches.

v2.description: v/by1 + mined hard cases that live OUTSIDE the discoverable space.

components.description: Mined hard cases (acronym/expansion, abbreviation, reordered, &/and) from mine_hard_cases.py, hand-labeled via `label.py --corpus supplement export`. Adds out-of-distribution positives so blocking_gap can be non-zero, plus hard negatives and 'related' pairs for the scorer.

v3.description: M6 active-learning corpus: v2 + uncertainty-sampled review rounds. Trains the v2 scorer. The frozen 112-pair benchmark (from v2, split v1) is subtracted at train time and is evaluation-only; every other v3 pair is train/calibration/validation. active_round_* components are ordered LAST so a re-labeled pair supersedes its original (dedup keeps the last occurrence).
